zh.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: 英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: 英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Cooke於1473年4月出生在英國艾可吉迪亞 霍爾時，他的父親Philip Cooke21歲，母親Elizabeth Belknap20歲。他於大約1500年與Alice Saunders結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年10月10日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年43歲。

zh-hans.Gidea Hall, Romford, Essex, England: 英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh-hans.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: 英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Cooke于1473年4月出生在英国艾可吉迪亞 霍爾时，他的父亲Philip Cooke21岁，母亲Elizabeth Belknap20岁。他于大约1500年与Alice Saunders结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年10月10日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Cooke was born in April 1473, in Gidea Hall, Essex, England, his father, Philip Cooke, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Belknap, was 20. He married Alice Saunders about 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 10 October 1516, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Cooke est né en avril 1473, à Gidea Hall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Philip Cooke, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Belknap, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Alice Saunders environ 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 octobre 1516, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Cooke im April 1473 in Gidea Hall, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Cooke 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Belknap 20. Er hat um 1500 Alice Saunders geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Oktober 1516 im Alter von 43 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cooke è nato il nel aprile 1473 nel Gidea Hall, Essex, England, il suo padre, Philip Cooke, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Belknap, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Alice Saunders circa 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1516, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.Gidea Hall, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスギディー ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Cookeが1473年4月にイギリスエセックスギディー ハルで生まれた時，父Philip Cookeは21歳，母Elizabeth Belknapは20歳であった。約1500年にAlice Saundersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年10月10日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Cooke(이)가 1473년 4월 영국 에세스 지디 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Cooke(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Belknap(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 Alice Saunders(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 10월 10일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.April 1473–10 October 1516: 1473 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1516 оны Аравдугаар сарын 10

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Cooke nasceu em abril de 1473, em Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Cooke, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Belknap, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Saunders aproximadamente 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1516, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Cooke родился апрель 1473 г. в местности гидеа холл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Cooke было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Belknap, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Saunders около 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 октября 1516 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Cooke nació en abril de 1473, en Gidea Hall, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Cooke, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Belknap, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Alice Saunders aproximadamente 1500. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1516, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
